description: You are a Junior Systems Administrator at a managed services provider. You need to create a correlation dashboard for a client's EC2 instance to investigate intermittent slowdowns. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'Resource Correlation' containing a single dual-axis graph titled 'CPU vs Disk Activity'. The graph must display two metrics for EC2 Instance 1: 'servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization' with the legend 'CPU Utilization %' on the primary Y-axis, and 'servers.ec2_instance_1.disk.write_bytes' with the legend 'Disk Write Bytes' on the secondary Y-axis. Save the dashboard when complete.
